name: MOps-Apalooza
description: The only conference built specifically for marketing operations professionals. Deep technical sessions on automation, data hygiene, attribution, and stack architecture.

name: MarTech Conference
description: Covers the intersection of marketing and technology. Sessions on stack consolidation, data management, vendor evaluation, and marketing ops career development.

name: Adobe Summit
description: Adobe's flagship conference with extensive Marketo and Experience Cloud content. Essential for MOps teams running enterprise marketing automation programs.

name: INBOUND
description: HubSpot's annual conference with deep tracks on marketing automation, CRM operations, and the HubSpot ecosystem. Critical for HubSpot-centric MOps teams.

name: Salesforce Connections
description: Focused on Salesforce Marketing Cloud and data integration. Ideal for MOps professionals managing Salesforce-based marketing stacks and cross-platform data flows.

name: Marketo User Summit
description: Part of Adobe Summit, focused specifically on Marketo users. Covers advanced automation, lead scoring, campaign architecture, and Marketo administration best practices.

name: Gartner Marketing Symposium
description: Gartner's premier marketing event. Covers MarTech stack rationalization, budget allocation, analytics maturity, and the evolving role of marketing operations.

name: MarketingProfs B2B Forum
description: Practical B2B marketing conference with sessions on marketing operations, analytics, technology adoption, and process optimization.

name: Forrester B2B Summit
description: Formerly SiriusDecisions Summit. Covers the full B2B revenue engine including marketing operations frameworks, demand waterfall models, and data management.

name: The MarTech Summit
description: Global MarTech summit series with regional events. Intimate format focused on MarTech stack strategy, digital transformation, and marketing ops leadership.

name: Integrate Conference
description: Focused on precision demand marketing and data quality. Covers lead management, data governance, and marketing operations process improvement.

name: HubSpot INBOUND
description: HubSpot's annual flagship with dedicated operations tracks. Covers HubSpot Operations Hub, workflow automation, data sync, and RevOps practices for MOps teams.
